summary: Admin Tourism CRUD feature testing complete - All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend admin panel fully functional with 6 tabs. Tourism management (Tur. tab) working correctly with add/edit/delete functionality. All previous features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: POST /api/admin/tourism/attractions creates attraction (requires admin auth)
✓ Backend: PUT /api/admin/tourism/attractions/{id} updates attraction (requires admin auth)
✓ Backend: DELETE /api/admin/tourism/attractions/{id} deletes attraction (requires admin auth)
✓ Backend: All endpoints return 401 without authentication
✓ Backend: All 6 category options validated (Historija, Priroda, Kultura, Religija, Sport, Ostalo)
✓ Frontend: Admin panel has 6 tabs (Lok., Kat., Biz., Tur., Obav., Post.)
✓ Frontend: Tur. tab shows attractions list with count
✓ Frontend: 'Nova' button opens modal with form (name, description, category selector, lat/lng)
✓ Frontend: Category selector shows all 6 options in horizontal scroll
✓ Frontend: Save button creates new attraction and updates list
✓ Frontend: Edit and delete buttons visible on each attraction card
✓ Frontend: Main page still shows Znamenitosti section with attraction cards
✓ Regression: All previous features working (map, search, categories, offers, events, leaderboard)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_tourism_crud.py - Created comprehensive test suite for admin tourism CRUD (12 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test attractions created and deleted during testing: TEST_Gradska biblioteka, TEST_Novi Muzej, TEST_Edit_Delete_Attraction. All cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New admin tourism CRUD feature fully functional. Admin panel now has 6 tabs including Tourism (Tur.) tab. Tourism management allows creating, editing, and deleting attractions with name, description, category (6 options), and coordinates. Backend endpoints require admin authentication. Main page Znamenitosti section continues to work correctly. All previous features verified working.
